periods.name: Today
periods.shortForecast: Mostly Sunny then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
periods.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms between 1pm and 2pm, then showers and thunderstorms likely between 2pm and 4pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 4pm and 5pm, then showers and thunderstorms likely.
